scripts.check:cf: node -e "const { execSync } = require('node:child_process'); const { mkdtempSync, rmSync } = require('node:fs'); const { tmpdir } = require('node:os'); const { join, resolve } = require('node:path'); const outDir = mkdtempSync(join(tmpdir(), 'frinter-wrangler-')); const outFile = join(outDir, 'worker-configuration.d.ts'); const bin = process.platform === 'win32' ? resolve('../../node_modules/.bin/wrangler.cmd') : resolve('../../node_modules/.bin/wrangler'); const command = '"' + bin + '" types "' + outFile + '" --config wrangler.jsonc'; try { execSync(command, { stdio: 'inherit' }); } finally { rmSync(outDir, { recursive: true, force: true }); }"
